recommendations.title: Asteroid City
recommendations.overview: In an American desert town circa 1955, the itinerary of a Junior Stargazer/Space Cadet convention is spectacularly disrupted by world-changing events.

recommendations.title: Isle of Dogs
recommendations.overview: In the future, an outbreak of canine flu leads the mayor of a Japanese city to banish all dogs to an island used as a garbage dump. The outcasts must soon embark on an epic journey when a 12-year-old boy arrives on the island to find his beloved pet.

recommendations.title: Poison
recommendations.overview: When a poisonous snake slithers onto an Englishman's stomach in India, his associate and a doctor race to save him.

recommendations.title: Castello Cavalcanti
recommendations.overview: In 1955 in Italy, race car driver Jed Cavalcanti suffers a mishap during the Molte Miglia rally and finds himself in a small town with a few familial surprises.

recommendations.title: The French Dispatch of the Liberty, Kansas Evening Sun
recommendations.overview: The staff of an American magazine based in France puts out its last issue, with stories featuring an artist sentenced to life imprisonment, student riots, and a kidnapping resolved by a chef.

recommendations.title: The Wonderful Story of Henry Sugar
recommendations.overview: A rich man learns about a guru who can see without using his eyes. He sets out to master the skill in order to cheat at gambling.

recommendations.title: The Rat Catcher
recommendations.overview: In an English village, a reporter and a mechanic listen to a ratcatcher explain his clever plan to outwit his prey.

recommendations.title: Fantastic Mr. Fox
recommendations.overview: The Fantastic Mr. Fox, bored with his current life, plans a heist against the three local farmers. The farmers, tired of sharing their chickens with the sly fox, seek revenge against him and his family.

recommendations.title: Cousin Ben Troop Screening
recommendations.overview: Cousin Ben hosts a screening of Wes Anderson's Moonrise Kingdom to the troops.

recommendations.title: The Swan
recommendations.overview: Two large, ignorant bullies ruthlessly pursue a small, brilliant boy in this young adult Roald Dahl short story.
